title: Largest 3-Same-Digit Number in String
titleCn: 字符串中最大的 3 位相同数字

testcases.input: num = "6777133339" Output: "777" Explanation: There are two distinct good integers: "777" and "333". "777" is the largest, so we return "777".
testcases.expectedOutput: "777" Explanation: There are two distinct good integers: "777" and "333". "777" is the largest, so we return "777".

testcases.input: num = "2300019" Output: "000" Explanation: "000" is the only good integer.
num = "42352338" Output: "" Explanation: No substring of length 3 consists of only one unique digit. Therefore, there are no good integers.
testcases.expectedOutput: "" Explanation: No substring of length 3 consists of only one unique digit. Therefore, there are no good integers.
